posts.title: RISC-V Development Environment Setup and Usage Guide
posts.author: Syed Taha
posts.excerpt: A guide to setting up RISC-V development environment using WSL, installing the VeeR-ISS simulator, RISC-V GNU toolchain, and compiling/running RISC-V code with analysis tools.

posts.title: Winning Solution for the Enhanced Safe Driver Prediction Challenge
posts.author: Syed Taha
posts.excerpt: 1st place solution using a stacking ensemble of XGBoost, LightGBM, and CatBoost with targeted preprocessing and meta-learning to predict insurance claims. Achieved 0.64671 Private AUROC.
